General.Name: SenseTime Group Inc Class B
General.Description: SenseTime Group Inc., an investment holding company, research, develops and sells artificial intelligence software platforms in Mainland China, Northeast Asia, Southeast Asia, and internationally. The company offers SenseFoundry Enterprise Platform that facilitate and accelerate the digital transformation of enterprise customers; SenseFoundry Platform for smart city management; SenseME that enables a range of IoT devices to facilitate perceptial intelligence and content enhancement; SenseMARS, a software platform that serves as the key enabling technology platform for the Metaverse; SenseCare Smart Health Platform, a diagnostic and treatment assistance solution; SenseAuto Platform, automotive application platform; and Sensetime Education that builds an AI education system, as well as AI-as-a-services. It also offers artificial intelligence data center services; software development services; information transportation; and software and information services; and sells software-embedded hardware and related services. In addition, the company is involved in private equity investments; and the development of computer vision technology, as well as research and development of AI technology. Further, it develops and sells software products, AI sensor technology, and system integration technology; and sells hardware products. SenseTime Group Inc. was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
